description_long: This is a robust, rectangular office desk with a smooth, light gray work surface and a sturdy blue base. The front side features two symmetrical columns of three drawers each, equipped with metallic handles for easy access. The desk's sides and back are solid blue panels, providing structural support and a clean, professional appearance. The top surface is spacious, suitable for computers, paperwork, or other office equipment. The desk stands on four short, metallic feet, slightly elevating it from the ground. Its utilitarian design and durable materials make it ideal for high-traffic or professional environments.
description: A sturdy blue office desk with a light gray top, featuring six front drawers and a solid, professional build.
description_view_0: Front view showing six drawers with metallic handles and an open knee space in the center.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid blue panel and the thickness of the gray top surface.
description_view_2: Back view with a continuous blue panel and no visible drawers or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a solid blue panel and visible desk height.
attribute_orientation: The side with the six drawers and open knee space is intended to face the user, serving as the functional front of the desk.
